MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS Hearing on Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award under the provisions of the written agreement between Petitioner and Respondents. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
